hero.subtitle: A wayfinding atlas for peptide injection — sites, technique, rotation, and the troubleshooting of a hundred small things that go wrong.
hero.meta: Patient-education only · No vendor links · Reviewed against the package insert

atlas.indexSubhead: Listed in the order a clinician would teach the material. Page numbers are stable across editions.
atlas.atlasNotShelf: An atlas, not an article shelf.
atlas.atlasNotShelfBody: Each entry in this site is a numbered chapter, grouped into one of four parts. You can read it cover to cover, or open the index and jump to the page you need.

methodology.label: Methodology · Edition v1.2
methodology.title: How a chapter gets written.
methodology.body: We work from the manufacturer Instructions for Use, the relevant CDC and WHO injection-safety guidance, and the nursing-education literature. Two independent sources have to agree before a chapter is published.

pipeline.label: Pipeline · 8 in research
pipeline.title: The chapters we are working on.
pipeline.body: The pipeline is public. Every chapter we are researching is listed with its working title, the questions it tries to answer, and the sources we have read so far.

stop.title: Stop · seek prescriber
stop.body: Nothing on InjectCompass is a substitute for the instructions that came with your medication or for advice from the clinician who prescribed it.

footer.patientEducationOnly: Educational and patient-education purposes only. We do not link to research-peptide vendors. We do not accept payment from drug manufacturers or telehealth clinics.
